title: Optimized ERC2981 royaltyInfo with fallback storage slots and packed slot extraction
explanation: First executes an optimized storage lookup for a specific tokenId royalty. If the upper 160 bits (the receiver address) are zero, it fallbacks to loading the master slot seed value using memory caching `mload(0x20)`. The token fee numerator is pulled seamlessly via XOR extraction to avoid clean bitmask masking.
when_to_apply: Standard NFT marketplaces querying royalty pricing constraints.
when_not_to_apply: When custom tier-based royalty logic relies on external dynamic contract hooks.
